assertions.description: INCORRECT: RP1 (value: PicoWModule, lib_id: New_Library:PicoWModule) is a Raspberry Pi Pico W MCU module. It is classified as 'resistor' because its reference starts with 'R'. The resistor count is reported as 47 instead of 46 actual discrete resistors. The USB_DM/USB_DP design observations correctly reference RP1 as a USB-capable device, which highlights the inconsistency — it is treated as MCU-like for USB detection but as a resistor for component type statistics.

INCORRECT: SD1 (value: SOFNG_SD-001, lib_id: custom_symbols:SOFNG_SD-001) is a MicroSD card socket classified as 'switch'. The SPI interface nets (SD_CLK, SD_CMD_MOSI, SD_D0_MISO, SD_D3_CS) are present but memory_interfaces is empty, same as the other three schematics.
